legalBasis: 《中华人民共和国劳动合同法》第46条、第47条、第87条

description.zh: 经济补偿金计算规则，覆盖N、N+1、2N三种法定场景
description.en: Severance calculation rules covering N, N+1, and 2N statutory scenarios

description.zh: 每满一年支付一个月工资，六个月以上不满一年按一年计算，不满六个月支付半个月工资
description.en: One month salary per year of service; 6+ months counts as 1 year; under 6 months = half month
Average monthly salary of the 12 months before termination

baseMonthlySalary.legalReference: 劳动合同法实施条例 第27条

description.en: Years of service at the current employer

description.zh: 六个月以上不满一年的，按一年计算；不满六个月的，向劳动者支付半个月工资
description.en: 6+ months counts as 1 year; under 6 months = half month salary

description.zh: 月工资上限为当地上年度职工月平均工资三倍
description.en: Monthly salary capped at 3x local average monthly wage

salaryCap.legalReference: 劳动合同法 第47条第2款

name.en: Severance + Payment in Lieu of Notice

description.zh: 经济补偿金N + 额外一个月工资（未提前30天通知时适用）
description.en: N severance + 1 month salary when 30-day notice was not given

description.zh: 代通知金，按劳动者上一个月的工资标准确定
description.en: Payment in lieu of notice, based on the employee's last month salary

description.zh: 用人单位违法解除劳动合同，按经济补偿金标准的二倍支付赔偿金
description.en: Employer illegally terminates contract, pays 2x the statutory severance

note.zh: 支付赔偿金后不再支付经济补偿金
note.en: No additional severance required after paying illegal termination compensation

calculation.legalReference: 劳动合同法实施条例 第25条

rule.zh: 试用期不符合录用条件解除无需支付补偿
rule.en: No severance for probation failure termination

specialRules.legalReference: 劳动合同法 第39条第1项

rule.zh: 企业降低条件续签被拒或企业不续签，需支付N
rule.en: Employer declines renewal or offers reduced terms, must pay N

specialRules.legalReference: 劳动合同法 第46条第5项

rule.zh: 当地上年职工平均工资3倍以内的部分免征个人所得税
rule.en: Severance within 3x local average annual salary is tax-exempt
